constraints: Did not call live api.z.ai or opencode.ai
Wrote only report and evidence files

assertions.reason: config.example.yaml contains a Z.AI GLM Coding Plan zai-api-key example with placeholder-only api-key, default Coding Plan base URL, and GLM model alias mapping; whole-file YAML and extracted commented block parse successfully.

zai.DefaultCodingBaseURL is defined as https://api.z.ai/api/coding/paas/v4 and is applied by config synthesis, file/auth-file synthesis, store/SDK file loading, and executor resolveCredentials when base-url is omitted.

zai-api-key config synthesizes active first-class provider zai auth records with label zai-apikey, auth_kind=apikey, api/base attributes, source, prefix/proxy/priority/header/models_hash/exclusion/disable-cooling metadata, and skips blank API keys.

File-backed type:zai auth is handled as API-key auth in synthesizer, internal store, SDK filestore, and file/git/object/postgres store paths; tests cover api_key/api-key, base_url/base-url defaulting, valid key preservation, and missing/blank unusable entries.
Static registry exposes glm-5.1, glm-5, and glm-5-turbo as Type/OwnedBy zai, supports /chat/completions, and advertises thinking metadata; TestZAIStaticModels passed.
Configured ZAI aliases resolve to upstream GLM model names and remain provider-scoped without colliding with other API-key provider aliases; service model registration honors aliases and exclusions.
Provider identifier zai matches synthesized/file-backed auth records and service/runtime paths register executor.NewZAIExecutor for first-class routing; targeted executor binding test passed.

commandsRun.command: python3 extracted YAML parse for /Users/trevor/code/CLIProxyAPIPlus/config.example.yaml and ZAI commented block
commandsRun.observation: Whole-file YAML parse and extracted ZAI commented block parse succeeded; block contains zai-api-key, Coding Plan base URL, glm-5 alias/model, and no sk- secret marker.
Found Z.AI example lines including zai-api-key, placeholder API key, api.z.ai Coding Plan URL, and GLM aliases/models.
Static references confirm first-class provider constant, default base URL, config/file synthesis, store paths, executor credential resolution, registry, alias handling, and executor registration.
Targeted synthesizer tests passed, including ZAI config synthesis, file-backed default base URL, kebab-case key, and missing/blank key skipping.
Targeted store and SDK auth-file tests passed for snake_case/kebab-case keys, blank/missing unusable entries, and default base URL.
Targeted registry, alias, model-listing, and executor-registration tests passed.
Mocked/local ZAI executor tests passed, including empty API-key rejection before dispatch and local-only token counting.

frictions.description: Initial commented-block extraction included the following Claude section and produced a YAML parse error in transient console output.
frictions.resolution: Reran extraction bounded by the next section header; final evidence file shows successful whole-file and extracted ZAI block parsing.

summary: Tested 7 assigned Z.AI config/auth/registry assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
